title: Bike Touring - Austria - Setting up my Bicamper at the Camp Site. 5-2010

transcript.text: Uh-huh. Hello, I figured I'd do a video of myself setting up my tent. Since the last time I did it, I was tripping and it took me a whole half hour to do it, so check it, check it, check it, check it.
Looks like the remote works from way back here, so that's good, it's okay.
The bike hamper tent, the bike hamper tent is light, very light and small, just how I like it.
Sometimes you stabilize it by putting them on the side, but I think I've done that.
I wiped out yesterday. Can you see that? Scraped up my arm. Bloody. Can you see that?
Alright, check out my campsite though. Check out my campsite.
Oh my god, the camera thinks it's 420.
Okay, yep, there's this big lake over there.
You can see the boat. There's this swan that swam over the other thing.
I mean like Lake District is the rest of the campsite.
I got the whole place to myself. Cool, cool.
